form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr3) over 2138m after showing early speed and racing wide at this track, beaten 21 m by Path To Greatness (2:30.60) in 4yo+ B 5 NR 55 or better on April 4 at $61. At his previous start was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr7) over 2138m after racing wide at this track, beaten 23 m by Ozzie Punta (2:30.80) in 4yo+ B 5 NR 55 or better on March 28 at $31. The ace draw may see improvement.
